codeReview.summary: Clean, focused change. Renames 'Gas:' to 'Gas Price:' in the reason box and adds a new gasPriceGwei parameter to both renderSpandexQuote and renderCurveQuote so that Gas Price displays adjacent to Gas Cost in result cards. The logic correctly handles three cases: (1) both gas_cost_eth and gasPriceGwei present — shows both side by side, (2) only gasPriceGwei — shows it alone, (3) neither — shows nothing. All 6 call sites updated consistently. The diff is 21 insertions / 11 deletions across a single file (src/server.ts), well-scoped to the feature.

issues.description: Duplicated gas info rendering logic: The gasInfoLine construction block (lines 5003-5013 in renderSpandexQuote and lines 5082-5092 in renderCurveQuote) is identical code. This is a minor DRY concern; a shared helper could reduce duplication, but given the inline HTML template architecture this is acceptable.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The fullstack-worker skill's 'Write Tests First (Red Phase)' section says to write server-side tests first for server-side changes, and only skip to manual verification for 'client-side-only changes (inline JS)'. This feature is technically a client-side-only change to the inline JS template, so skipping tests is justified per the skill. The worker correctly identified this and wrote no new tests. No skill update needed.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Handoff tests.coverage: 'No new tests needed - UI-only change to labels and positioning'. Skill section 2 explicitly says 'For client-side-only changes (inline JS): Testing is done via manual verification (step 4) since the UI is inline HTML'.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Worker followed procedure correctly: ran typecheck, lint, and tests; performed 3 interactive browser checks covering both Base and Ethereum chains plus the Curve tab. The gas_price_gwei parameter is passed from the top-level compare response data (which comes from the server) rather than from the individual quote objects, which is architecturally correct since gas price is a network-level value shared across all quotes.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Diff shows data.gas_price_gwei passed at all 6 renderSpandexQuote/renderCurveQuote call sites from the compare response object.

summary: The implementation correctly renames 'Gas:' to 'Gas Price:' in the reason box and adds Gas Price display adjacent to Gas Cost in both Spandex and Curve result cards. The change is minimal (32 lines changed in 1 file), covers all expectedBehavior requirements, and all verification checks (typecheck, lint, 136 tests, 3 interactive browser checks) passed. One minor non-blocking observation about duplicated gasInfoLine construction logic across the two render functions. No bugs or edge case gaps found.
